name: Pilav Kuzulu (Lamb Pilaf)
recipeIngredient: Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the tomatoes.
2. Heat olive oil in a 5-quart Dutch oven that can be placed in an oven.
3. Add onion and fry until soft and golden.
4. Add lamb and brown on all sides.
5. Stir in salt, pepper, and cinnamon.
6. Add chopped tomatoes, pine nuts, raisins, and sliced green pepper.
7. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Stir in rice and cook for 2 more minutes.
9. Mix in parsley and broth.
10. Cook over moderate heat until all liquid is absorbed and small holes appear on the surface of the rice.
11. Place casserole in a preheated oven set to 300°F (150°C) and bake for approximately 30 minutes.
(Note: In original recipe, entire process was done on the stove, with last 30 minutes placed on an asbestos pad and heat lowered to low.)
